expectations.text: Defines WowAggregate type for user aggregate
expectations.evidence: userAggregate.ts defines UserAggregate class implementing AggregateNameCapable, AggregateIdCapable, StateCapable, FunctionInfoCapable interfaces (lines 116-120)

expectations.text: Handles CreateUserCommand with proper state creation
expectations.evidence: handleCreateUserCommand method at lines 158-235 validates and creates initial state
handleUpdateUserCommand method at lines 240-316 handles state transitions with validation
handleDeleteUserCommand method at lines 321-364 implements soft delete
All handlers return CommandResult via createCommandResult factory function

expectations.text: Includes TypeScript typing for commands and state
expectations.evidence: Complete interfaces: UserState, CreateUserCommand, UpdateUserCommand, DeleteUserCommand, UserResult

eval_feedback.overall: No suggestions, evals look solid. Both with_skill and without_skill produced comprehensive implementations.
